morel.sourceNote: Conservative heuristic for spring morel flush-likelihood only. Sources support cool, moist spring conditions and rain/moisture as important for morel fruiting, but no source found gives a defensible national mm-per-72h trigger.

sources.title: MushroomExpert.com: Morels
sources.note: General morel ecology and spring fruiting reference; no rainfall threshold.

sources.title: The Spruce: How to Grow Morel Mushrooms
sources.note: Describes cool, moist weather, scattered rain, and 60-70 F days as favorable; no wild-foraging threshold.
